pi_items.source: Calculated from data/hr_schema.sql by aggregating employees per department. Only departments 30, 50, 60, 80, 100 have >3 employees, totaling 96.
Calculated from data/hr_schema.sql by joining department names for IDs 100, 60, 30, 80, 50 which each have >3 employees.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the standard Oracle HR sample schema, which is synthetically seeded via a local SQL script. By parsing the seed data, it was confirmed that exactly 5 departments contain more than 3 employees: Shipping (45), Sales (34), Finance (6), Purchasing (6), and IT (5). A correct query strictly targeting these departments will return exactly 96 rows. The expected SQL and CSV file output paths match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt.
